title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images depicting cityscapes from Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image highlights aspects of urban life and technology.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces the theme 'An Evolving Nation' with a focus on exploring China's urban landscape. It invites viewers to take a ride through different cities in China.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session involves investigating and researching cities based on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. The aim is to understand the positive impact of development.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches each city to its corresponding developmental strategy. Beijing focuses on integrating technology and tradition, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Each city is viewed through the lens of sustainability, tourism, and technology. The focus is on how cities develop strategies based on local features to promote growth.
